metadata.description: Memex realized with LLMs — a personal wiki the model maintains. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM wiki pattern.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Synthesize Claude sessions and notes into a self-maintaining personal wiki. Provides /wiki-init, /wiki-ingest, /wiki-ask, /wiki-lint, /wiki-upgrade-schema commands plus a SessionEnd hook for automatic capture.
